Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: CAROL KAREN, CSR#8189. (514)

Briana E. McCarthy, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ELIZABEHT TAYLOR, JAMES TAYLOR, and NINA WEST ("plaintiffs").
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY in the amount of $565,305.00 in Economic Damages, $1,400,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, for a total amount of $1,965,305.00
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
